title: 2026-01-13 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 18.93
description: Automated market-pressure update for 2026-01-13: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 18.93/100, signaling a low pressure regime as inflation expectations and front-end rate pressure shaped the daily read. See the chart pack, score regime, and what drove the latest reading.
